title: Robinhood Q4 2023 Earnings Preview: Can Company Rebound From Q3 Miss?
text: Analysts expected Robinhood to report Q4 2023 results demonstrating recovery from third quarter weakness. Q4 2023 Expectations: Revenue estimate of $920.41 million, up from $471.0 million in Q4 2022. EPS estimate of $0.43, up from $0.03 in Q4 2022. Revenue Context: The expected revenue would represent a company record and signaled return to quarter-over-quarter growth after Q3 broke a streak of consecutive increases. Key Metrics to Monitor: Gold Subscribers Growth: Robinhood had added 860,000 Gold subscribers in Q3 to reach 2.2 million total, representing a key recurring revenue driver. New Product Impact: Robinhood Legend desktop platform launch was expected to receive mentions and show positive traction. Election Contracts: Q4 saw introduction of 2024 election prediction contracts with hundreds of thousands trading, providing new revenue potential. Product Diversification: The company's success in expanding beyond traditional equities trading into options and prediction markets was a key focus area. Investor Sentiment: Despite Q3 challenges, analysts saw Q4 as an inflection point with management initiatives gaining traction.
